summary: A left hero proof block leads the page while a compact finance or comparison table and a supporting chart share the right and lower proof field.
composition_pattern: left hero, right table support, lower or adjacent chart proof
support_structure: right-side compact finance or comparison table
optional small assumptions note or summary strip
when_to_use: The table is an important proof device, not a minor footnote
The slide needs more explicit numeric substantiation beside the hero claim
avoid_when: The page has no real table or tabular proof
The chart should dominate more than the numeric table
